subcodes.first_line: O loving friend! The honored epistle was a rare and luminous gem, for its contents were replete [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یار مهربان من رقیمه کریمه فریده غراء بود و خریده نوراء زیرا مضمون مشحون
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @Imam Husayn, @martyrs and martyrdom, @non-participation in politics, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
